Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class OwnedContentDocument

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.OwnedContentDocument
public class OwnedContentDocument extends SObject

Java class for OwnedContentDocument complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="OwnedContentDocument">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="ContentDocument" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ContentDocument" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContentDocumentId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContentSize" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContentUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ExternalDataSourceName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ExternalDataSourceType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FileExtension" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FileType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Owner" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OwnerId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Title" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
